title: Microsoft Releases Self-Developed Dual Models MAI-Image-2.5-Pro and MAI-Voice-2-Flash: No Distillation from Third Parties, Already Implemented in Bing and PowerPoint
excerpt: Microsoft announced the launch of two self-developed AI models, MAI-Image-2.5-Pro and MAI-Voice-2-Flash, on July 23, both of which have entered the public previ
content_html:
Microsoft announced the launch of two self-developed AI models, MAI-Image-2.5-Pro and MAI-Voice-2-Flash, on July 23, both of which have entered the public preview stage. The two models are aimed at high-quality image generation and high-concurrency voice interaction scenarios. Microsoft emphasized that their training data has been cleaned and is traceable, and they do not rely on third-party model distillation. From the bottom-up design, they directly serve Microsoft product users.

Image model with highest precision, GPU cost reduced by up to 84%

MAI-Image-2.5-Pro is Microsoft's highest-precision image model, targeting high-demand scenarios such as main visual image generation, detailed editing, and text rendering within images, and supports natural language editing instructions. This model has become the default image generation model in Bing Image Creator, and is used for image-to-image editing functions in PowerPoint. Compared to GPT-Image-2, it can reduce GPU costs by up to 84%. After deployment in OneDrive, the success rate of relevant scenarios increased by 26%, P95 latency decreased by about 25%, and efficiency in medium-load production environments increased by 2.5 times.

Regarding pricing, it charges $5 per million tokens for text input and $106 per million tokens for image output.

Voice model speed doubled, serving customers like T-Mobile

MAI-Voice-2-Flash is optimized for high-frequency voice applications, with a speed increase of about 2 times compared to the previous generation and a cost reduction of 32%, suitable for fast-response scenarios such as customer service centers and voice assistants. The model has been integrated into Dynamics 365 Contact Center, serving customers like T-Mobile and EasyJet, with a maximum GPU cost reduction of 89%. Microsoft has also integrated it into Azure Voice Live service, supporting developers to build voice-to-voice interactive agents.

In addition, the MAI-Transcribe-1.5 in the same series has been applied to the medical voice solution Dragon Copilot, used by 170,000 healthcare providers, processing 28 million patient consultation records last quarter, supporting 58 languages, with transcription error rates decreasing by about 50% for most languages. Microsoft revealed that the next-generation GB200 computing cluster has already gone into operation, and the MAI series models will continue to expand.

sentences.en: In addition, the MAI-Transcribe-1.5 in the same series has been applied to the medical voice solution Dragon Copilot, used by 170,000 healthcare providers, processing 28 million patient consultation records last quarter, supporting 58 languages, with transcription error rates decreasing by about 50% for most languages.
sentences.zh: 此外，同系列的MAI-Transcribe-1.5已应用于医疗语音解决方案Dragon Copilot，上季度有17万医疗机构使用，处理了2800万条患者咨询记录，支持58种语言，大多数语言的转录错误率下降了约50%。

sentences.zh: 微软透露，下一代GB200计算集群已经投入运行，MAI系列型号将持续扩展。

content_html_zh:
微软于7月23日宣布推出两款自研AI模型MAI-Image-2.5-Pro和MAI-Voice-2-Flash，均已进入公开预览阶段。 这两个模型针对的是高质量图像生成和高并发语音交互场景。 微软强调，他们的训练数据已经清洗且可追溯，并且他们不依赖第三方模型蒸馏。 他们从自下而上的设计出发，直接服务于微软产品的用户。

最高精度图像模型，GPU成本降低高达84%

MAI-Image-2.5-Pro是微软最高精度的图像模型，针对主视觉图像生成、细节编辑、图像内文本渲染等高需求场景，支持自然语言编辑指令。 该模型已成为 Bing Image Creator 中的默认图像生成模型，并用于 PowerPoint 中的图像到图像编辑功能。 与GPT-Image-2相比，它可以降低GPU成本高达84%。 部署在OneDrive后，相关场景成功率提升26%，P95延迟降低约25%，中负载生产环境效率提升2.5倍。

关于定价，文本输入每百万代币收费 5 美元，图像输出每百万代币收费 106 美元。

语音模型速度翻倍，为 T-Mobile 等客户提供服务

MAI-Voice-2-Flash针对高频语音应用进行了优化，速度较上一代提升约2倍，成本降低32%，适用于客服中心、语音助手等快速响应场景。 该模型已集成到 Dynamics 365 Contact Center 中，为 T-Mobile 和 EasyJet 等客户提供服务，GPU 成本最大降低了 89%。 微软还将其集成到Azure Voice Live服务中，支持开发人员构建语音对语音交互代理。

此外，同系列的MAI-Transcribe-1.5已应用于医疗语音解决方案Dragon Copilot，上季度有17万医疗机构使用，处理了2800万条患者咨询记录，支持58种语言，大多数语言的转录错误率下降了约50%。 微软透露，下一代GB200计算集群已经投入运行，MAI系列型号将持续扩展。
